case_title: STEPHEN RIDZON VS. TAX NINJA INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,403.75 FILED BY RIDZON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL KARATOR--TAX ATTORNEY--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2014 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RECALLING WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATIFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS FILED ON 9/23/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-09-2014 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIDZON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIDZON, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC. $4,403.75 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,468.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIDZON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.
SIGNED & SEALED ORDER RECALLING WRIT OF EXECUTION (ISSUED ON SEPTEMBER 02, 2014) AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-22-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAX NINJA INC.
